mapper.select: SELECT cd.code_value AS value, cd.code_name AS label FROM code_group cg INNER JOIN code_detail cd ON cd.code_group_seq = cg.code_group_seq WHERE cg.code_group_id = 'A0001' AND cg.use_yn = 'Y' AND (cg.status IS NULL OR cg.status = 'ACTIVE') AND cd.use_yn = 'Y' AND (cd.status IS NULL OR cd.status = 'ACTIVE') ORDER BY cd.sort_order ASC, cd.code_detail_seq ASC

SELECT cd.code_value AS value, cd.code_name AS label FROM code_group cg INNER JOIN code_detail cd ON cd.code_group_seq = cg.code_group_seq WHERE cg.code_group_id = #{groupId} AND cg.use_yn = 'Y' AND (cg.status IS NULL OR cg.status = 'ACTIVE') AND cd.use_yn = 'Y' AND (cd.status IS NULL OR cd.status = 'ACTIVE') ORDER BY cd.sort_order ASC, cd.code_detail_seq ASC

SELECT cd.attr1 AS attr1, cd.code_name AS codeName, cd.code_value AS codeValue, cd.description AS description FROM code_detail cd INNER JOIN code_group cg ON cg.code_group_seq = cd.code_group_seq WHERE cd.use_yn = 'Y' AND cg.use_yn = 'Y' AND (cg.status IS NULL OR cg.status = 'ACTIVE') AND (cd.status IS NULL OR cd.status = 'ACTIVE') AND cg.code_group_id = 'A0001' AND cd.code_id = 'A00017' ORDER BY cd.sort_order ASC, cd.code_detail_seq ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT b.board_seq, b.category_code, CASE WHEN cg.code_group_seq IS NOT NULL THEN cd.code_name END AS category_name, CASE WHEN IFNULL(b.report_count, 0) >= #{blindReportThreshold} THEN #{blindListTitle} ELSE b.title END AS title, CASE WHEN IFNULL(b.report_count, 0) >= #{blindReportThreshold} THEN '' ELSE b.content END AS content, b.writer_member_seq, wm.member_id AS writerMemberId, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(wm.nickname), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(b.writer_name), ''), wm.member_id) AS writer_name, b.secret_yn AS secretYn, b.anonymous_yn AS anonymousYn, b.secret_password_hash AS secretPasswordHash, COALESCE( CASE WHEN wm.profile_image_file_seq IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('/api/files/view/', wm.profile_image_file_seq) END, wm.profile_image_url ) AS writer_profile_image_url, b.view_count, b.like_count, b.dislike_count, b.comment_count, b.comment_like_count, b.comment_report_count, b.report_count, b.show_yn, b.highlight_yn, b.comment_allowed_yn AS commentAllowedYn, b.reply_allowed_yn AS replyAllowedYn, DATE_FORMAT(b.create_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS create_dt, DATE_FORMAT(b.modify_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS modify_dt FROM board b LEFT JOIN code_detail cd ON cd.code_value = b.category_code AND cd.use_yn = 'Y' AND (cd.status IS NULL OR cd.status = 'ACTIVE') LEFT JOIN code_group cg ON cg.code_group_seq = cd.code_group_seq AND cg.code_group_id = 'A0001' AND cg.use_yn = 'Y' AND (cg.status IS NULL OR cg.status = 'ACTIVE') LEFT JOIN member wm ON wm.member_seq = b.writer_member_seq
ORDER BY b.highlight_yn DESC
, b.like_count DESC
, b.board_seq DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT b.board_seq, b.category_code, cd.code_name AS category_name, CASE WHEN IFNULL(b.report_count, 0) >= #{blindReportThreshold} THEN #{blindListTitle} ELSE b.title END AS title, CASE WHEN IFNULL(b.report_count, 0) >= #{blindReportThreshold} THEN '' ELSE b.content END AS content, b.writer_member_seq, wm.member_id AS writerMemberId, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(wm.nickname), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(b.writer_name), ''), wm.member_id) AS writer_name, b.secret_yn AS secretYn, b.anonymous_yn AS anonymousYn, b.secret_password_hash AS secretPasswordHash, COALESCE( CASE WHEN wm.profile_image_file_seq IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('/api/files/view/', wm.profile_image_file_seq) END, wm.profile_image_url ) AS writer_profile_image_url, b.view_count, b.like_count, b.dislike_count, b.comment_count, b.comment_like_count, b.comment_report_count, b.report_count, b.show_yn, b.highlight_yn, b.comment_allowed_yn AS commentAllowedYn, b.reply_allowed_yn AS replyAllowedYn, DATE_FORMAT(b.create_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS create_dt, DATE_FORMAT(b.modify_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS modify_dt FROM board b INNER JOIN code_detail cd ON cd.code_value = b.category_code AND cd.use_yn = 'Y' AND (cd.status IS NULL OR cd.status = 'ACTIVE') INNER JOIN code_group cg ON cg.code_group_seq = cd.code_group_seq AND cg.use_yn = 'Y' AND (cg.status IS NULL OR cg.status = 'ACTIVE') LEFT JOIN member wm ON wm.member_seq = b.writer_member_seq
ORDER BY b.highlight_yn DESC, b.board_seq DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM board b INNER JOIN code_detail cd ON cd.code_value = b.category_code AND cd.use_yn = 'Y' AND (cd.status IS NULL OR cd.status = 'ACTIVE') INNER JOIN code_group cg ON cg.code_group_seq = cd.code_group_seq AND cg.use_yn = 'Y' AND (cg.status IS NULL OR cg.status = 'ACTIVE')

SELECT b.board_seq, b.category_code, CASE WHEN cg.code_group_seq IS NOT NULL THEN cd.code_name END AS category_name, b.title, b.content, b.writer_member_seq, wm.member_id AS writerMemberId, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(wm.nickname), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(b.writer_name), ''), wm.member_id) AS writer_name, b.secret_yn AS secretYn, b.anonymous_yn AS anonymousYn, b.secret_password_hash AS secretPasswordHash, COALESCE( CASE WHEN wm.profile_image_file_seq IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('/api/files/view/', wm.profile_image_file_seq) END, wm.profile_image_url ) AS writer_profile_image_url, b.view_count, b.like_count, b.dislike_count, b.comment_count, b.comment_like_count, b.comment_report_count, b.report_count, b.show_yn, b.highlight_yn, b.comment_allowed_yn AS commentAllowedYn, b.reply_allowed_yn AS replyAllowedYn, DATE_FORMAT(b.create_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createDt, DATE_FORMAT(b.modify_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS modifyDt FROM board b LEFT JOIN code_detail cd ON cd.code_value = b.category_code AND cd.use_yn = 'Y' AND (cd.status IS NULL OR cd.status = 'ACTIVE') LEFT JOIN code_group cg ON cg.code_group_seq = cd.code_group_seq AND cg.code_group_id = 'A0001' AND cg.use_yn = 'Y' AND (cg.status IS NULL OR cg.status = 'ACTIVE') LEFT JOIN member wm ON wm.member_seq = b.writer_member_seq WHERE b.board_seq = #{boardSeq} AND b.use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT b.board_seq, b.category_code, cd.code_name AS category_name, b.title, b.content, b.writer_member_seq, wm.member_id AS writerMemberId, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(wm.nickname), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(b.writer_name), ''), wm.member_id) AS writer_name, b.secret_yn AS secretYn, b.anonymous_yn AS anonymousYn, b.secret_password_hash AS secretPasswordHash, COALESCE( CASE WHEN wm.profile_image_file_seq IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('/api/files/view/', wm.profile_image_file_seq) END, wm.profile_image_url ) AS writer_profile_image_url, b.view_count, b.like_count, b.dislike_count, b.comment_count, b.comment_like_count, b.comment_report_count, b.report_count, b.show_yn, b.highlight_yn, b.comment_allowed_yn AS commentAllowedYn, b.reply_allowed_yn AS replyAllowedYn, DATE_FORMAT(b.create_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createDt, DATE_FORMAT(b.modify_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS modifyDt FROM board b INNER JOIN code_detail cd ON cd.code_value = b.category_code AND cd.use_yn = 'Y' AND (cd.status IS NULL OR cd.status = 'ACTIVE') INNER JOIN code_group cg ON cg.code_group_seq = cd.code_group_seq AND cg.code_group_id = 'A0007' AND cg.use_yn = 'Y' AND (cg.status IS NULL OR cg.status = 'ACTIVE') LEFT JOIN member wm ON wm.member_seq = b.writer_member_seq WHERE b.board_seq = #{boardSeq} AND b.use_yn = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board ( category_code, title, content, writer_member_seq, writer_name, secret_yn, secret_password_hash, anonymous_yn, view_count, like_count, dislike_count, comment_count, comment_like_count, comment_report_count, report_count, show_yn, highlight_yn, comment_allowed_yn, reply_allowed_yn, use_yn, create_dt, create_id, create_ip, modify_dt, modify_id, modify_ip ) VALUES ( #{categoryCode}, #{title}, #{content}, #{writerMemberSeq}, #{writerName}, #{secretYn}, #{secretPassword}, #{anonymousYn}, #{viewCount}, #{likeCount}, #{dislikeCount}, #{commentCount}, #{commentLikeCount}, #{commentReportCount}, #{reportCount}, #{showYn}, #{highlightYn}, #{commentAllowedYn}, #{replyAllowedYn}, 'Y', NOW(), #{createId}, #{createIp}, NOW(), #{modifyId}, #{modifyIp} )
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET category_code = #{categoryCode}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, secret_yn = #{secretYn}, secret_password_hash = #{secretPassword}, anonymous_yn = #{anonymousYn}, show_yn = #{showYn}, highlight_yn = #{highlightYn}, comment_allowed_yn = #{commentAllowedYn}, reply_allowed_yn = #{replyAllowedYn}, modify_dt = NOW(), modify_id = #{modifyId}, modify_ip = #{modifyIp} WHERE board_seq = #{boardSeq} AND use_yn = 'Y'
UPDATE board SET use_yn = 'N', modify_dt = NOW() WHERE board_seq = #{boardSeq} AND use_yn = 'Y'
UPDATE board SET view_count = IFNULL(view_count, 0) + 1 WHERE board_seq = #{boardSeq} AND use_yn = 'Y'
UPDATE board SET like_count = IFNULL(like_count, 0) + 1 WHERE board_seq = #{boardSeq} AND use_yn = 'Y'
UPDATE board SET dislike_count = IFNULL(dislike_count, 0) + 1 WHERE board_seq = #{boardSeq} AND use_yn = 'Y'
UPDATE board SET report_count = IFNULL(report_count, 0) + 1 WHERE board_seq = #{boardSeq} AND use_yn = 'Y'
UPDATE board SET comment_count = IFNULL(comment_count, 0) + 1 WHERE board_seq = #{boardSeq} AND use_yn = 'Y'
UPDATE board SET comment_count = GREATEST(IFNULL(comment_count, 0) + #{delta}, 0) WHERE board_seq = #{boardSeq} AND use_yn = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO board_action_log ( board_kind, target_kind, target_seq, action_type, member_seq, member_id, client_ip, create_dt ) VALUES ( #{boardKind}, #{targetKind}, #{targetSeq}, #{actionType}, #{memberSeq}, #{memberId}, #{clientIp}, NOW() )
